name: Capacitor harness + native runtime abstraction (iOS Wave 3)
spec_consumed: docs/CLUBHOUSE_SPEC-4-Wave3-implementation.md (578 lines — Wave 3 implementation overview, § 7.4 native helper architecture)

modules: src/core/native/camera.js — photo capture (Camera plugin → file picker)
src/core/native/share.js — share sheet (Share plugin → Web Share API → clipboard)
src/core/native/push.js — push notifications architected (Launch Phase B activation)
vite.config.js — CORE_FILES extended with native/* subdir paths
implementation.test_coverage: Smoke 26/26 chromium — modules load without affecting web flows

acceptance_criteria.evidence: iOS folder not yet generated (requires macOS + Xcode); minimum target setting lands when npx cap add ios runs on Apple Developer-enrolled machine

acceptance_criteria.criterion: Native helper modules with web fallback (camera, GPS, haptics, share, device, storage, push)
acceptance_criteria.evidence: 7 modules in src/core/native/ each with native + web paths via PB.native.isNative() detection
Same module interface, runtime-detection internal — screen code in M2-M6 imports without conditional branches
src/core/native/push.js — _launchPhaseBActive=false flag gates registration; flip to true at Launch Phase B with Apple Developer + APNs cert

acceptance_criteria.criterion: Cold launch to first paint ≤1500ms iPhone 12 baseline
acceptance_criteria.evidence: Web baseline 65/100 Lighthouse Performance; iOS cold launch measurement requires actual iOS build (macOS/Xcode)

founder_action_required: Apple Developer Program enrollment (LLC + D-U-N-S + Apple Developer Org tier) — parallel workstream, gates M6 + Launch Phase B per spec
macOS machine + Xcode for npx cap add ios → ios/ project generation → iOS 16 target configuration
outcome: BASELINE-COMPLETE — Capacitor config + 7 native helper modules + Vite wiring shipped. iOS Xcode project generation + cold-launch measurement deferred to Apple Developer workstream.
downstream_consumers: M2 Home tab · M3 Play tab · M4 Stats tab · M5 Feed tab · M6 More tab. All consume PB.native.* uniformly.
